name: celina_tx
notes: US suburbia: Celina on the Dallas-Fort Worth northern fringe, one of the fastest-growing US cities, converting ranchland to master-planned subdivisions. Densities are indicative suburban tiers (2.5/12/30 dwellings/acre at household 2.5); the low tier dominates. Leapfrog growth is characteristic, so dispersal is moderate. Confirm against city projections.
